nasb.text: Then one of the seraphim flew to me with a burning coal in his hand, which he had taken from the altar with tongs.

esv.text: Then one of the seraphim flew to me, having in his hand a burning coal that he had taken with tongs from the altar.

cnv.text: 有一個撒拉弗飛到我面前，手裡拿著燒紅的炭，是用火鉗從祭壇上取來的。

ccb.text: 有个撒拉弗天使用火钳从祭坛上取了一块燃烧的炭，飞到我面前，

csbs.text: 有一个撒拉弗向我飞来，手中拿着烧红的炭，是用火钳从祭坛上取来的。
